title: Glorious Rich Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A rich and comforting Norwegian lamb stew featuring hind shank, perfect for a cold day. This dish is kosher-friendly and made with tender lamb and vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb pieces on all sides, then set them aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, flour, salt, and pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the browned lamb to the pot and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
